calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Raymond Burke, Esq., Tel.415.931.4207, appearing specially for plaintiff;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF CHARLES MORALES' Motion For Attorney's Fees And Costs is granted. No opposition filed. Defendant shall pay Plaintiff attorneys fees and costs in the amount of $4,950.88 within 30 days of entry of this order. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Off Calendar

Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-29-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Michael Heath, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Charles Morales.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Mit Patel dba MIT Computers,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Plaintiff Charles Morales is Sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

It is hereby ordered, adjudged and decreed that the Plaintiff Charles Morales is entitled to Judgment against Defendant Mit Patel and MIT Computers as follows;

Judgment on the first cause of action for violation of California labor code section 510 in the amount of &7,740.00 plus attorney fees which shall be determined in a motion to be filed by Plaintiff, and judgment on the second cause of action for violation of California labor code section 226 in the amount of $2,250.00 plus attorney fees and costs on noticed motion, Judgment for violation of California Labor Code Section 203, (waiting time penalties) in the amount of $400.00. Judgment for failure to provide meal and rest periods as required by law in the amount of $1,150.00. Judgment is hereby entered in favor of Charles Morales against Mit Patel in the amount of $11,540.00. Plaintiff is entitiled to make a motion for attorney's fees and costs at a later date.

Judgment signed in Court.
